backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (vehicles, variants, colors, blog posts, media assets, visitor stats, etc.) and including mixins for blob storage and authorization with access control state initialization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms OldMediaAsset records (with assetId field) to NewMediaAsset records (with blobId field) by directly mapping assetId to blobId.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: MediaUploadZone component for uploading images/PDFs with progress feedback, and MediaAssetGrid component for displaying uploaded assets with thumbnails and delete functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and layouts for both public and admin sections of the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file (content truncated or not present).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring React Router with public routes (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga, Mobil Niaga, Promo, Blog, etc.) and admin routes protected by AuthGuard, plus React Query client and theme provider setup.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog component for creating and editing admin users with form fields for name, email, and principal ID (for new users only), using mutation hooks for create/update operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component displaying admin users with email, name, role badge, and action buttons for edit/delete, preventing deletion of the last admin user.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: Dialog component for selecting banner images from media assets, filtering images with 'banner' in filename and displaying them in a radio-group grid with recommended dimensions for main or CTA banners.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: Dialog form for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields, includes token validation to check delegation identity expiration before submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Table component displaying all blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions, includes confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Grid display of media assets (images and PDFs) with copy ID and delete actions, renders thumbnails for images and file icons for PDFs using blob storage URLs.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: File upload component with drag-and-drop support, validates file types (images and PDFs) and sizes, includes token validation before upload and displays progress.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog form for creating and editing passenger vehicles with fields for name, description, and base price, handles both create and update operations.
Displays a table of passenger vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes loading skeletons, empty state, and a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Modal dialog for creating or editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Displays a table of promotions with edit, delete, and active status toggle actions. Shows promotion period dates and includes loading states and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Modal dialog for creating or editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and handles timestamp generation for new testimonials.
Displays a table of testimonials showing customer name, content, and star rating. Provides edit and delete action buttons with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart showing the top 10 most visited pages using Recharts. Handles URL truncation for display and converts bigint view counts to numbers.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Displays a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts, with loading skeleton and empty state handling. Converts bigint timestamps to formatted dates for display.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if identity is missing or expired, showing loading state during initialization.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Renders a list of 5 hardcoded article links with icons that navigate to blog detail pages when clicked.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with 4 CTA buttons (Call, WhatsApp, Simulasi, Menu) and a dropdown menu for site navigation. Includes click-outside detection to close the menu.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Allows users to select a vehicle variant from a list of buttons, triggering a callback with the selected variant ID.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a CTA banner image fetched from media assets API with fallback to generated static image. Shows loading skeleton while fetching.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with 4 columns showing logo/description, contact info, social media links, and visitor statistics (today/total). Auto-refreshes visitor stats every 15 seconds.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero banner that displays different titles, icons, backgrounds, and subtexts based on the current pathname (home, mobil-keluarga, mobil-niaga, promo, etc.).
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays up to 8 family vehicles in a carousel using vehicle catalog data from API with loading state.
Displays up to 8 commercial vehicles in a carousel using vehicle catalog data from API with loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Displays the main banner image fetched from media assets API with fallback to generated static image. Shows loading skeleton while fetching.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar component with mobile menu support, logo, and links to main site sections (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga, Mobil Niaga, Promo, Testimoni, Blog, Kontak).
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Component displaying like and share buttons for vehicles with counts, integrating native Web Share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Featured products section that displays the first 4 vehicle catalogs in a responsive grid using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Search section with input field and button that redirects to mobil-keluarga page with search query parameter.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section showcasing three dealership advantages: flexible installments, low down payment, and negotiable pricing with icons.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: About Us section displaying static text describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership and its services.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component for choosing vehicle variants and colors with button groups, triggering callback on selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, base price, and detail link with slug-based URL generation.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and user feedback messages for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing authenticated/anonymous actor creation with Internet Identity integration and automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook for fetching admin dashboard statistics (vehicles, contacts, leads, visitors); currently returns default zeros as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Hooks for CRUD operations on admin users with authentication/network error handling and toast notifications; backend methods not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations with authentication and network error handling. Currently stubbed with placeholder implementations awaiting backend methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD operations. All methods are stubbed and return empty/null data as backend implementation is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting contact form data. Backend method is not implemented, currently logs a warning.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: React Query hook to fetch all contact submissions. Returns empty array as backend method is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: React Query mutation hook for submitting credit simulation requests. Backend method is not implemented, currently logs a warning.
React Query hook to fetch all credit simulations. Returns empty array as backend method is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY AuthClient. Manages login state, identity persistence, and provides authentication status throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: React Query hooks for media asset management including upload, fetch, and delete operations with progress tracking and error handling. Implements blob storage integration with the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: React Query hooks for product like/share functionality. All methods are stubbed as backend implementation is missing, returns zero counts.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: React Query hooks for promotion CRUD operations with authentication and network error handling. Currently stubbed with placeholder implementations awaiting backend methods.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching vehicle catalog data (all catalogs and individual vehicle with catalog), currently stubbed to return empty/null until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a React Query hook for fetching website settings, currently stubbed to return null until backend implementation is complete.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks and mutations for testimonial CRUD operations with enhanced error handling (auth, network) and toast notifications; currently stubbed until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Exports React Query hooks and mutations for vehicle CRUD operations with enhanced error classification (auth, network) and toast notifications; currently stubbed to return empty/null until backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics (current stats, trends, page views); only getVisitorStats is implemented and enabled, others are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Legacy React hook for visitor tracking that is now deprecated; tracking functionality has been moved to PublicLayout component to avoid duplication.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and updating website settings with enhanced error handling (auth, network) and toast notifications; currently stubbed until backend implementation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for theming (light and dark modes) including colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin dashboard layout component with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile behavior, menu items for all admin sections, and logout functionality with query cache clearing.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes Navbar, conditional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar; implements visitor tracking on page navigation using actor and tracking utilities while skipping bots and admin routes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
Admin users management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog post management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and query cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the family vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a sortable table of credit simulations submitted by visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, tenor, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and visitors with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays a sortable table of contact form submissions with name, email, message, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management page with upload zone and asset grid, invalidating cache on successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Passenger vehicles management page with list view and add/edit dialog for vehicle CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Promotions management page with list view and add/edit dialog for managing promotional content.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Testimonials management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete confirmation alert dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard page displaying visitor statistics with auto-refresh every 15 seconds, showing metrics like total visitors, daily/weekly/monthly counts, online users, and page views. Includes trend charts and top pages visualization using custom hooks and chart components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for managing website settings including site name, contact information, social media URLs, and banner images. Uses form state management with hooks for fetching and updating settings data.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that handles Internet Identity authentication with loading states, error handling, and automatic redirect to admin dashboard on successful login.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple sections including main banner, vehicle highlights (family and commercial), CTA banner, about section, special features, product search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article details, currently showing a development-in-progress message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing a development-in-progress message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Contact page with a form for customer inquiries including personal details, vehicle interest, down payment, and tenor information. Uses mutation hook to submit contact form data.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Family vehicle detail page showing vehicle information, pricing, variant/color selection, specifications, and features. Includes product interactions and action buttons for contacting sales and credit simulation.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Family vehicles listing page displaying up to 8 published vehicle catalogs in a responsive grid layout using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Commercial vehicles category page that displays vehicles filtered by category parameter, showing up to 8 vehicles in a grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Commercial vehicle detail page similar to family vehicle detail but uses CommercialVariantSelector instead of color selection, showing specifications, features, and action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Displays three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to category-specific pages.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page showing a "under development" message for promotions, directing users to contact sales.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that calculates monthly installments based on vehicle selection, down payment, and tenor; submits simulation requests to backend.
Placeholder page showing a "under development" message for customer testimonials.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: TypeScript type definitions for all data models including Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, WebsiteSettings, AdminUser, ContactSubmission, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, and CommercialVehicleCategory.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate with standard amortization formula.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Form validation functions for required fields, email, phone, length constraints, numeric values, and URLs.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation, device/browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended theme properties, container settings, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state file for a media manager application with stable image/PDF upload and storage capabilities. Tracks existing features for MediaUploadZone and MediaAssetGrid components, plus pending feature requests for backend storage implementation using Motoko stable memory with file validation and CRUD operations.
